description: Used Glob pattern 'config/**' which matched only .env and .credentials — missed settings.json because it has no extension prefix. Wasted multiple rounds searching for the IES app URL before David pointed out it was in config/settings.json.
correction: David pointed out config/settings.json was visible and contained the URL.
fix_applied: Added explicit instruction to rigby-evolution-package skill: always read config/settings.json directly — do not search for it.
